summary.en: An AI agent that turns market and account data into portfolio insights—performance, allocation, and risk—delivered through natural language with actionable next steps.
summary.ko: An AI agent that turns market and account data into portfolio insights—performance, allocation, and risk—delivered through natural language with actionable next steps.
summary.ja: 市場データと口座データを自然言語での会話を通じて、パフォーマンス、アロケーション、リスクのポートフォリオインサイトに変換し、行動可能な次の一手まで提示するAIエージェント。

title.en: AIP Use Case: Portfolio Insight AI Agent
